name: Hansen, the Stranded Mechanic
lines: Damn it, the air is filled with the stench of blood instead of oil!
I should've welded the engine room door shut... those things are crawling through the gaps!
I'm at my limit with this wrench. These scraps are going to be my grave.

friendly.greeting: Shh, keep your voice down! They're sensitive to sound. Hide behind the tracks for now.
friendly.farewell: Get out of here alive. Just... don't die on me, okay?

normal.greeting: Who are you? Are you still alive? The depot is already crawling with those monsters. Find a place to hide, now!
normal.farewell: Move out if you're done! You're just bait for them if you stay here.

hostile.greeting: You're no different from those monsters, disturbing my peace! Ending you here with my own hands would be a mercy!
hostile.farewell: Go ahead, try to run! The things hiding in the corners will tear you limb from limb anyway!

deathLine: In the end... I was the one... to break... before the machines...
description: The chief mechanic stranded amidst the collapse of the vehicle depot and the onslaught of monsters. He is pushed to his absolute breaking point.
encounter: Hansen: (Gripping a bloodstained wrench, trembling) Look over there! Monsters are crawling from the end of the tracks! My trains have become their nests!
Hansen: The coolant line burst! I can barely breathe in this heat, and there are even worse things lurking outside. This is hell itself!
Hansen: The Resistance? Those lunatics messed with that strange corpse and caused this whole mess! They've turned the entire depot into a slaughterhouse!
Hansen: The emergency shutters won't go down! Those things chewed through the entire power grid. We're trapped in a giant steel coffin!
Hansen: Please, stop! The screams of those monsters won't stop ringing in my head! I just want to hear the sound of machines... please!
